dataneeds.Label: Case list
dataneeds.Description: One row by case, pseudonymized linkabe data, including: date of diagnostic, onset of symptoms, symptoms description, age, sex, geographical area, imported case identifier

dataneeds.Label: Contact tracing register
dataneeds.Description: One row by contact, pseudonymized linkable data, including: context of contact, last exposure date, travel history, date of recovery, link to confirmed case, cluster identifier

dataneeds.Label: Death register
dataneeds.Description: One row by death, pseudonymized linkable data, including information on geographical area, sex, age, cause of death

dataneeds.Label: Genomic database
dataneeds.Description: Sequencing and corresponding metadata, variant lineage classification

dataneeds.Label: Number of new cases by date by country
Number of new hospitalisations by date by country
Number of deaths by date by country
Intervention (medical counter measure or non-pharmaceutical intervention) by country
dataneeds.Description: Type of intervention, start and end date

dataneeds.Label: Hospitalisation register
dataneeds.Description: One row by hospitalisation, pseudonymized linkabe data, including: institution, age, sex, geographical area, comorbidities, date of admission, date of discharge, date of ICU admission, date of ICU discharge, date of death, date of transfer

dataneeds.Label: Animal testing register
dataneeds.Description: One row by test including: test result, species, geographical location of animal sampling, type of test, date of sampling

dataneeds.Label: Diagnostic test sensitivity
Diagnostic test specificity
Limit of detection of tes (viral copies per mL)
Regulatory approval status (coded: national, international, pending, not approved)
Approved use case for test (coded: screening, confirmation, surveillance)
Evaluation study design (coded: RCT, observational, modelled, etc.)
Outcome measure type (cases averted, deaths averted, cost saved, etc.)
Quantitative effect size (numerical value, with confidence interval if available)
Comparator/control group description (coded category)
Reimbursed medication data
dataneeds.Description: Pseudonymized linkable data, including: sex, age, presence of comorbidities, immunocomproside status, pregnancy status

dataneeds.Label: Number of ICU beds (total and real-time availability)
dataneeds.Description: Granularity: hospital level

dataneeds.Label: Number of beds (total and real-time availability)
dataneeds.Description: Granularity: hospital level

dataneeds.Label: Number of surge capacity beds (total and real-time availability)
dataneeds.Description: Granularity: hospital level

dataneeds.Label: Number of trained ICU staff available
dataneeds.Description: Granularity: hospital level

dataneeds.Label: Unit cost of drugs (per dose)
Unit cost of vaccines (per dose)
Unit cost of diagnostics (per test)
Procurement cost per item category
Distribution cost per item category
PPE stock monitoring system
dataneeds.Description: Daily updated stock, Including: PPE category (masks by type, gloves, gowns), expiration date

dataneeds.Label: Survey data on adherence to intervention
dataneeds.Description: Assessing willingness to comply, perceived effectiveness, barriers to adoption, and trust in authority

dataneeds.Label: Testing materials suplies monitorig system
dataneeds.Description: Daily updated stock, including: type of material (PCR, antigneic kit, nasopharyngeal swab), expiration date

dataneeds.Label: Diagnostic test types available (PCR/Ag/Ab; coded)
Laboratory tests register
dataneeds.Description: One row by test, pseudonymized linkabe data, including: date of sampling, date of test, date of entry, type of test, prescription reason, prescriber, test performer, test result

dataneeds.Label: Number of municipalities not covered
Number of reports received from rural facilities
Number of reports received from urban facilities
Number of imported live animals
Number of customs consignments flagged for bio-risk
Country of origin code (per consignment)
Number of international air arrivals
Number of land border crossings
Traveler origin–destination code (per record)
Number of active crisis events in the region
Number of functioning vs. closed health facilities
Number of border closures due to crisis
Mobility data
dataneeds.Description: From mobile device logs, geolocalization data, public transport boardings

dataneeds.Label: Socio-demographic data
dataneeds.Description: Pseudonymized linkable data, includig: age, sex, geographical area, household composition, migration background

dataneeds.Label: Clinical staff on duty (count/shift)
Clinical staff absent (count/shift)
Number of quarantine beds (total and real-time availability)
dataneeds.Description: Granularity: hospital level

Clinical trial efficacy rate for each therapeutic
Real-world effectiveness in treated patients

Rate of adverse events per therapeutic
Cost per treated patient

dataneeds.Description: Daily updated stock, including: drug product, expiration date

dataneeds.Label: Proportion of population working remotely
Average downtime of production facilities (days/year)
Number of reported large gatherings
Median delay in drug production
Identified bottleneck stage (coded: production, transport, customs)

Proportion of systems scoring “ready”

Date of last triage protocol update
Number of facilities applying triage protocol
Number of ambulances
Average response time to emergency calls
Number of patients transferred

dataneeds.Description: Assessing trust in health authorities, reasons for refusal or delay, adherence to preventive measures, cultural practices affecting adherence, social or economic barriers
